activity_state.name: activity_state
activity_state.help:
Status based on activities
Overdue: Due date is already passed
Today: Activity date is today
Planned: Future activities.

activity_exception_decoration.name: activity_exception_decoration
activity_exception_decoration.help: Type of the exception activity on record.

activity_exception_icon.name: activity_exception_icon
activity_exception_icon.help: Icon to indicate an exception activity.

message_needaction.name: message_needaction
message_needaction.help: If checked, new messages require your attention.

message_has_error.name: message_has_error
message_has_error.help: If checked, some messages have a delivery error.

message_has_error_counter.name: message_has_error_counter
message_has_error_counter.help: Number of messages with delivery error

message_has_sms_error.name: message_has_sms_error
message_has_sms_error.help: If checked, some messages have a delivery error.

effective_date.name: effective_date
effective_date.help: Date at which the equipment became effective. This date will be used to compute the Mean Time Between Failure.

next_action_date.name: next_action_date
next_action_date.string: Date of the next preventive maintenance

contract_start_date.name: contract_start_date
contract_start_date.help: Fecha de inicio del contrato de mantenimiento

contract_end_date.name: contract_end_date
contract_end_date.help: Fecha de finalización del contrato de mantenimiento

mtbf.name: mtbf
mtbf.help: Mean Time Between Failure, computed based on done corrective maintenances.

estimated_next_failure.name: estimated_next_failure
estimated_next_failure.string: Estimated time before next failure (in days)
estimated_next_failure.help: Computed as Latest Failure Date + MTBF

ir_model_fields.name: estimated_next_failure
ir_model_fields.field_description: Estimated time before next failure (in days)

ir_model_fields.name: next_action_date
ir_model_fields.field_description: Date of the next preventive maintenance

request_date.name: request_date
request_date.help: Date requested for the maintenance to happen

archive.name: archive
archive.help: Set archive to true to hide the maintenance request without deleting it.

schedule_date.name: schedule_date
schedule_date.help: Date the maintenance team plans the maintenance.  It should not differ much from the Request Date.
